title: The Royal Tournament and the Lost Fragment
article_text: It was a weird hypothesis that the old fragment of stone could unite the kingdom. The mayor and his aunt wandered alongside the ancient wall, gazing at the fading light. A sudden cough from behind made them both turn, and they saw a royal guard standing there. The guard gently wiped the dust off the stone fragment, revealing a strange symbol. Not only did the registration for the tournament begin that day, but also the theoretical study of the stone started. It is the darkness that hides the truth, the old man said, and then he began to compute the possible meaning of the symbol. The curtain slowly fell, and the scene faded into a dreamlike state. A fool would ignore the hypothesis, but the experimental evidence was clear. The institutional support for the research was strong, and they could not wipe the smile off their faces. Only then did they realize that the fragment was a key to a lost empire, and they would unite all the people gently, like a slice of bread broken and shared.

sentences.en: It was a weird hypothesis that the old fragment of stone could unite the kingdom.
sentences.zh: 这是一个奇怪的假设，即古老的石头碎片能够统一王国。

a small piece that has broken off something

image_prompts: A person holding a small stone fragment under a bright light, looking confused.
An elderly woman and a man in a suit walking along an old stone wall at sunset.
A guard in royal armor turning around after hearing a cough behind him.
A guard carefully cleaning a dusty stone fragment with a cloth, revealing a strange symbol.
A large banner advertising a tournament registration, with a scholar studying a stone nearby.
An old man pointing at a dark corner, with a symbol glowing faintly in the darkness.
A theater stage with a red curtain falling, and the scene behind it becoming blurry and dreamlike.
A silly-looking person ignoring a stone with symbols, while a scientist shows clear test results.
A group of happy scientists in a lab, smiling and holding a stone fragment.
A hand breaking a slice of bread into pieces, with a glowing fragment and a map of an ancient empire in the background.
